entries.source: Reading knowledge plus formal speech routines
entries.value: Ulwazi lokufunda kanye nezindlela zokukhuluma ezisemthethweni

entries.source: Recognition is useful, but it is weaker evidence than applying the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Ukuqaphela kuyasiza, kodwa kuwubufakazi obubuthakathaka kunokusebenzisa umqondo ngaphandle kwempendulo phambi kwakho.

entries.source: Recommend opening questions for this encounter, grouped by interview, debate, contradiction, and legacy.
entries.value: Ncoma imibuzo yokuvula yalo mhlangano, eqoqwe ngokwenhlolokhono, impikiswano, ukungqubuzana, kanye nefa.

entries.source: Reconstruct a decision, alternatives, constraints, and outcomes.
entries.value: Yakha kabusha isinqumo, izindlela ezingasetshenziswa, imikhawulo, kanye nemiphumela.

entries.source: Red sandstone heat, ink, perfumed paper, controlled silence, and many languages orbiting power.
entries.value: Ukushisa kwetshe elibomvu, uyinki, iphepha elinephunga elimnandi, ukuthula okulawulwayo, nezilimi eziningi ezizungeza amandla.

entries.source: Reframe my next question as a student trying to understand the mental model, not just the biography.
entries.value: Phinda ubeke umbuzo wami olandelayo njengomfundi ozama ukuqonda imodeli yengqondo, hhayi nje umlando wempilo.

entries.source: Remove weak, generic, or low-fit ideas quickly.
entries.value: Susa imibono ebuthakathaka, evamile, noma engafanele ngokushesha.

entries.source: Removes the failing path instead of understanding it.

entries.value: Qamba kabusha okuguquguqukayo kuyo yonke indawo.

entries.source: Repairing the misconception makes the next problem easier instead of just more familiar.
entries.value: Ukulungisa ukungaqondi kahle kwenza inkinga elandelayo ibe lula esikhundleni sokuba ijwayeleke nje.

entries.source: Repeating a definition without applying it can feel fluent while hiding gaps.
entries.value: Ukuphinda incazelo ngaphandle kokuyisebenzisa kungazwakala njengokukhuluma kahle kuyilapho kufihla izikhala.

entries.source: Rephrase the active question in simpler language. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Phinda ubeke umbuzo okhuthele ngolimi olulula. Buza umbuzo owodwa kuphela.

entries.source: Reset the controls, move only one slider, and describe the before-and-after in plain language.
entries.value: Setha kabusha izilawuli, hambisa isilayidi esisodwa kuphela, bese uchaza okwenzeke ngaphambi nangemva ngolimi olulula.

entries.source: Resolve the event clock before opening the world
entries.value: Xazulula iwashi lomcimbi ngaphambi kokuvula umhlaba

entries.source: Restaurants and drivers can be suppliers, but this specific clue is about customers comparing and switching.
entries.value: Izindawo zokudlela nabashayeli bangaba ngabahlinzeki, kodwa lo mkhondo othile umayelana namakhasimende aqhathanisayo futhi ashintshayo.

entries.source: Restoration London faces plague memory, dense timber housing, and a fire that will reshape the city.
entries.value: ILondon yaseRestoration ibhekene nenkumbulo yobhubhane, izindlu eziqinile zokhuni, kanye nomlilo ozoshintsha idolobha.

entries.source: Reveal the starting model before the lesson explains it.
entries.value: Yembula imodeli yokuqala ngaphambi kokuba isifundo siyichaze.

entries.source: Rewrite the current rough section as a suggested edit. Show what changed and why before asking me to merge it.
entries.value: Bhala kabusha isigaba esingaqediwe njengokuhlela okuphakanyisiwe. Khombisa ukuthi yini eshintshile nokuthi kungani ngaphambi kokungicela ukuthi ngikuhlanganise.

entries.source: Right. Transfer to a fresh example is stronger evidence than recognition.
entries.value: Kulungile. Ukudlulisela esibonelweni esisha kuwubufakazi obuqinile kunokubona.

entries.source: Right. You identified a seller-side cost shock and predicted the pressure on price.
entries.value: Kulungile. Ukhombe ukushaqeka kwezindleko ohlangothini lomthengisi futhi wabikezela ingcindezi entengo.

entries.source: Roman trade used amphorae and contracts

Rupees, silver coin, credit through trusted households

entries.source: Safe, explanatory, and easier to pause for context.
entries.value: Kuphephile, kuyachaza, futhi kulula ukumisa isikhashana ukuze uthole umongo.

entries.source: Safer, more explanatory, and allowed to ask modern comparisons.
entries.value: Kuphephe kakhudlwana, kuyachaza kakhudlwana, futhi kuvunyelwe ukubuza ukuqhathanisa kwesimanje.

entries.source: Salt air, olive oil, rope fiber, shouted accounts, and the heavy logistics behind imperial abundance.
entries.value: Umoya wosawoti, uwoyela womnqumo, intambo yefayibha, ama-akhawunti amemeziwe, kanye nezinto ezisindayo ezingemuva kwenala yombuso.

entries.source: Salt March strategist, St. Helena retrospective, 1946 committee room...
entries.value: Isistimu ye-Salt March, ukubuyekezwa kwe-St. Helena, igumbi lekomiti lango-1946...

entries.source: Say why the mistake is tempting, then name the missing link.
entries.value: Sho ukuthi kungani iphutha liheha, bese usho isixhumanisi esilahlekile.

entries.source: Saying revenue is up, so the company is worth more ignores margins, reinvestment, working capital, and risk.
entries.value: Ukuthi imali engenayo ikhuphukile, ngakho inkampani ibiza kakhulu, kuziba imajini, ukutshalwa kabusha, imali esebenzayo, kanye nobungozi.
Isayensi, ubuholi, intando yeningi, impilo yansuku zonke...

entries.source: Seeing the output change but not naming the mechanism.
entries.value: Ukubona okukhiphayo kushintsha kodwa ungasho indlela okwenzeka ngayo.

entries.source: Set a place, period, and mission. Your guide will keep the trip bounded to the era and mark speculation clearly.
entries.value: Setha indawo, isikhathi, kanye nomsebenzi. Umhlahlandlela wakho uzogcina uhambo lusezingeni lesikhathi futhi uzophawula ukuqagela ngokucacile.

entries.source: Set a thinking target and I will ask the first diagnostic question.
entries.value: Setha inhloso yokucabanga futhi ngizobuza umbuzo wokuqala wokuxilonga.

entries.source: Several locations, figures, artifacts, and field notes.
entries.value: Izindawo ezimbalwa, izibalo, izinto zakudala, namanothi enkundla.

entries.source: Short factual notes clarify uncertainty, bias, and interpretation.
entries.value: Amanothi amafushane angamaqiniso acacisa ukungaqiniseki, ukukhetha uhlangothi, nokuhumusha.

entries.source: Short summaries keep both sides aligned before moving on.
entries.value: Izifinyezo ezimfushane zigcina zombili izinhlangothi zivumelana ngaphambi kokuqhubeka.

entries.source: Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Ingabe inkampani kufanele ingene kule makethe?

entries.source: Show more uncertainty, anachronism, and source-boundary notes.
entries.value: Bonisa ukungaqiniseki okwengeziwe, ukungahambisani nesikhathi, namanothi emithombo.

entries.source: Show the person's major beliefs at this time, their blind spots, and what they would likely resist understanding.
entries.value: Bonisa izinkolelo ezinkulu zomuntu ngalesi sikhathi, izindawo abangaziboni, nalokho abangase bakwenqabe ukukuqonda.

entries.source: Sketch the outline, sections, or table before polishing language.
entries.value: Dweba uhlaka, izigaba, noma ithebula ngaphambi kokulungisa ulimi.

entries.source: Small nudges arrive before direct explanations.
entries.value: Izikhumbuzo ezincane ziza ngaphambi kwezincazelo eziqondile.

entries.source: Small reserve in local coin or credit
entries.value: Isilondolozi esincane ngemali yendawo noma isikweletu

entries.source: Socrates was tried and executed in 399 BCE
entries.value: USocrates wahlulelwa futhi wabulawa ngonyaka ka-399 BCE

entries.source: someone who changed education and faced serious opposition
entries.value: umuntu owashintsha imfundo futhi wabhekana nokuphikiswa okukhulu

entries.source: Sources, confidence, uncertainty, and forbidden quotes.
entries.value: Imithombo, ukuzethemba, ukungaqiniseki, kanye nezingcaphuno ezinqatshelwe.

entries.source: Specific prices vary by evidence and period
Specific private opinions of unnamed residents
entries.value: Imibono eyimfihlo ethile yezakhamuzi ezingashiwongo amagama

entries.source: Split work into AI-owned, user-owned, and shared moves.
entries.value: Hlukanisa umsebenzi ube yimisebenzi ephethwe yi-AI, ephethwe ngumsebenzisi, kanye neyabiwe.

entries.source: Stage the person, year, room, and relationship.
entries.value: Beka umuntu, unyaka, igumbi, kanye nobudlelwano.

entries.source: Standing idle with strange questions during a disaster invites suspicion.
entries.value: Ukuma ungenzi lutho nemibuzo eyinqaba ngesikhathi senhlekelele kuvusa ukungabaza.

entries.source: Start a Time Travel expedition. Do not open a generic chat and do not write a broad period summary.
entries.value: Qala uhambo lokuhamba ngesikhathi. Ungavuli ingxoxo ejwayelekile futhi ungabhali isifinyezo esibanzi sesikhathi.

entries.source: Start with a concept, case, argument, decision, or text.
entries.value: Qala ngomqondo, icala, impikiswano, isinqumo, noma umbhalo.

entries.source: Start with a question, not a lecture.
Start with a tiny lesson, one check question, a mastery meter, and wait for my answer before continuing.
entries.value: Qala ngesifundo esincane, umbuzo owodwa wokuhlola, imitha yobungcweti, bese ulinda impendulo yami ngaphambi kokuqhubeka.

entries.source: Start with an era passport, a vivid arrival scene, three choices for what to do next, and a compact timeline log.
entries.value: Qala ngephasiphothi yesikhathi, isigcawu sokufika esicacile, izinketho ezintathu zalokho okufanele ukwenze ngokulandelayo, kanye nelogi yomugqa wesikhathi ohlangene.

entries.source: Start with one specific question or task.
entries.value: Qala ngombuzo owodwa othize noma umsebenzi.

entries.source: State the idea in one sentence so it can be tested.
entries.value: Veza umbono emshweni owodwa ukuze ukwazi ukuhlolwa.

entries.source: State your starting idea so the tutor has something to test.
entries.value: Veza umbono wakho wokuqala ukuze umfundisi abe nokuthile angakuhlola.

entries.source: Stateful exploration with consequences and evolving risk.
entries.value: Ukuhlola okugcwele imiphumela kanye nobungozi obuguqukayo.

entries.source: Step by step, brainstorm first, solve together...
entries.value: Isinyathelo ngesinyathelo, qala ngokucabanga, xazululani ndawonye...

entries.source: Step out of character briefly. Explain the historical context, evidence quality, and uncertainties behind the last exchange.
entries.value: Phuma kancane kulingiswa. Chaza umongo womlando, ikhwalithi yobufakazi, nokungaqiniseki okungemuva kokushintshana kokugcina.

entries.source: Stone dust, wool dye, bells, and sharp political glances under a crowded square.
entries.value: Uthuli lwamatshe, udayi woboya, izinsimbi, nokubuka okubukhali kwezepolitiki ngaphansi kwesikwele esigcwele abantu.

entries.source: Stop editing directly for this turn. Give concise advice and one practical next move.
entries.value: Yeka ukuhlela ngokuqondile kulo mjikelezo. Nikeza iseluleko esifushane kanye nesinyathelo esisodwa esisebenzayo esilandelayo.

entries.source: Stopped. Send another message whenever you are ready.
entries.value: Kumisiwe. Thumela omunye umyalezo noma nini lapho usukulungele.

entries.source: Strict mode keeps modern knowledge out of the world and applies social consequences sooner.
entries.value: Imodi eqinile igcina ulwazi lwesimanje ngaphandle komhlaba futhi isebenzisa imiphumela yezenhlalo ngokushesha.

entries.source: Strong writing is a chain of claim, reason, evidence, and consequence. Each sentence should do a job in that chain.
entries.value: Ukubhala okunamandla kuwuchungechunge lwesimangalo, isizathu, ubufakazi, kanye nomphumela. Umusho ngamunye kufanele wenze umsebenzi kulelo chungechunge.

entries.source: Substitutes are alternatives like cooking or pickup. Comparing apps is buyer leverage inside the category.
entries.value: Okubambele yizindlela ezinye ezifana nokupheka noma ukuthatha. Ukuqhathanisa izinhlelo zokusebenza kuwukusebenzisa amandla komthengi ngaphakathi kwesigaba.

entries.source: Suggest candidates with strong evidence and vivid settings.
entries.value: Phakamisa abazongenela ukhetho ngobufakazi obuqinile nezimo ezicacile.

entries.source: Supply shifts left and price tends to rise.
entries.value: Ukuphakela kuyashintsha kuye kwesobunxele futhi intengo ivame ukukhuphuka.
ozakwethu abasekelayo kanye nomakhi okanye naye

entries.value: Thatha ithuba lokuqala kule nto eyabiwe. Yenza isakhiwo sibonakale, maka imibono, futhi ucele ukuba ngamukele, ngihlele, noma ngenqabe.

entries.source: Target: one sentence describing the learning target.
entries.value: Okuhlosiwe: umusho owodwa ochaza okuhlosiwe ukufundwa.

entries.source: That catches the revenue movement, but misses the margin and cash timing links. Sales alone do not prove cash flow improved.

entries.source: That may hide the symptom, but it does not teach you where the data flow broke.
entries.value: Lokho kungase kufihle uphawu, kodwa akukufundisi lapho ukugeleza kwedatha kwephuke khona.

entries.value: Umsizi kumele akhombe amaqiniso aziwayo ngaphambi kokulingisa

entries.value: Isifinyezo sokugcina silinda uze wenze ukucabanga kwangempela.

entries.source: The first scene should become concrete only after the destination is resolved.
entries.value: Isigcawu sokuqala kufanele sibe esibambekayo kuphela ngemva kokuba indawo oya kuyo isixazululiwe.

entries.value: Ukuvukela kwamaNdiya kwango-1857 kwenze iDelhi yaba yindawo yombuso neyempi ephikiswayo.

entries.source: The learner can connect a variable change to an outcome.
entries.value: Umfundi angakwazi ukuxhumanisa ushintsho oluguquguqukayo nomphumela.

entries.source: The learner can explain the key link in their own words.
entries.value: Umfundi angakwazi ukuchaza isixhumanisi esiyinhloko ngamazwi akhe.

entries.source: The learner can identify and fix the misconception.
entries.value: Umfundi angakwazi ukubona nokulungisa umbono ongalungile.

entries.source: The learner can make a first prediction.
The learner explains it back in their own words.
The longest sentence, because shorter is always stronger.
entries.value: Umushwana omude kakhulu, ngoba omfushane uhlale unamandla.

entries.source: The person should not know future events unless you explicitly open modern confrontation.
entries.value: Umuntu akufanele azi ngezenzakalo zesikhathi esizayo ngaphandle uma uvula ukungqubuzana kwesimanje ngokusobala.

entries.source: The scene is being established by the dossier.

entries.source: The title, because every weak paragraph has a weak title.

entries.source: This is the evidence checkpoint. You advance only by showing the skill.
entries.value: Lesi yisikhungo sokuhlola ubufakazi. Uqhubeka kuphela ngokukhombisa ikhono.

entries.source: This lets you explain why a model moves instead of just copying formulas.
entries.value: Lokhu kukuvumela ukuthi uchaze ukuthi kungani imodeli ihamba esikhundleni sokumane ukopishe amafomula.

entries.source: Time slice: not chosen yet. If a specific person is named, offer 4 to 5 historically meaningful versions of this person before any in-character dialogue. Explain how each version changes the worldview, stakes, and setting.
entries.value: Isikhathi esinqunyiwe: akukakhethwa. Uma umuntu othile eqanjwa ngegama, nika izinguqulo ezi-4 kuya kwezi-5 zalomuntu ezinomlando oqondile ngaphambi kwanoma yikuphi ukukhuluma okungokomlingiswa. Chaza ukuthi inguqulo ngayinye iyishintsha kanjani indlela yokubona umhlaba, izingozi, nesimo.

entries.source: Titles matter, but this clue points to reasoning inside the paragraph.
entries.value: Izihloko zibalulekile, kodwa lo mkhondo ukhomba ekucabangeni okungaphakathi kwendima.

entries.source: Trace a trade route on the map
trace cause and effect in code
Track accepted changes, rejected changes, and the next edit.
entries.value: Landelela izinguquko ezamukelwe, izinguquko ezaliwe, nokuhlela okulandelayo.

entries.source: Track decisions and open questions. Preserve my voice in writing tasks. Ask at most one practical question if context is missing.
entries.value: Landelela izinqumo nemibuzo evulekile. Londoloza izwi lami emisebenzini yokubhala. Buza umbuzo owodwa owusizo kakhulu uma ulwazi oluthile lungekho.
